# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.

Prevent api gateway security.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8000
    routes:
      - name: user-route
        paths:
          - /users
        strip_path: true
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 100
          policy: local
      - name: key-auth

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8000
    routes:
      - name: order-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        strip_path: true
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 50
          policy: local
      - name: key-auth

  - name: product-service
    url: http://product-service:8000
    routes:
      - name: product-route
        paths:
          - /products
        strip_path: true
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 75
          policy: local
      - name: key-auth

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - http://example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
      credentials: true
